ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2009 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2009 Continued To Dec-28-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Kent S. Hori, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Japan Center Garage Corporation.
Richard Hashimoto, Corporate Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Cyberonix, IPARKING or Bruce Khavar.
Defaults were entered against these three defendants on March 6, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 14, 2009.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Tepco Systems was filed on January 12, 2009.
Dismissal with prejudice as to defendants Intertech Data Systems, Inc. and George Ogawa was filed on June 19, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Japan Center Garage Corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendants Cyberonix, IPARKING and Bruce Khavar as follows:

Damages/Principal - $435,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $30,727.04.
Costs - $335.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $466,062.04.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
